name: System Owner or User Discovery (Windows)
notes:
This rule detects system owner or user discovery activities.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Local Accounts Discovery
SIGMA Description: Local accounts, System Owner/User discovery using operating systems utilities


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( "Process Full Full Name" == 'cmd.exe' AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '% dir %' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /c%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\users\%' ) ) OR ( ( "Process Full Full Name" == 'net.exe' OR "Process Full Full Name" == 'net1.exe' ) AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%user%' ) AND NOT ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?\/(domain|add|delete|active|expires|passwordreq|scriptpath|times|workstations).*?' ) OR "Process Full Full Name" in ('whoami.exe', 'quser.exe', 'qwinsta.exe') OR ( "Process Full Full Name" == 'wmic.exe' AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%useraccount%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get%' ) ) OR ( "Process Full Full Name" == 'cmdkey.exe' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /l%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY System Owner or User Discovery (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ( 	"Process Full Full Name" == 'cmd.exe' 	AND 	( 		LOWER("Command") LIKE '% dir %' 		OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /c%'  		OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\users\%' 	) ) OR ( 	( 		"Process Full Full Name" == 'net.exe'  		OR  		"Process Full Full Name" == 'net1.exe' 	) 	AND  		LOWER("Command") LIKE '%user%' ) AND NOT ( 	LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?\/(domain|add|delete|active|expires|passwordreq|scriptpath|times|workstations).*?' ) OR 	"Process Full Full Name" in ('whoami.exe', 'quser.exe', 'qwinsta.exe') OR 	( 		"Process Full Full Name" == 'wmic.exe'  		AND  		( 			LOWER("Command") LIKE '%useraccount%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get%' 		) 	) OR 	( 		"Process Full Full Name" == 'cmdkey.exe' 		AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '% /l%' 	) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: System Owner or User Discovery (Windows)
Event description: Detects system owner or user discovery activities.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
